review_title: AI enabled assistant for factual writing
description: Overall, it offers clean and intuitive interface with strong fact checking great for content structuring
author: Nishant T.
pros: - AI backed writing with in-build plagiarism checker - Fact checker feature enables users to verify the claims, reducing misinformation risk - Clean and easy interface making new users navigate the platform easily - Wide range for pre-build templates contents to work on - Multi language support with affordable pricing
cons: - Issues around tone and style consistency - Sometime multi-step workflows feel cumbersome - Lacks advance grammar checks
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Speed Up Your Article Generation Using This Excellent Long-form AI Content Writer
description: Since I've been using LongShot, the amount of time it takes me to create an article has gone down. Although LongShot can write a blog that ranks high on search engines, I find AI assistance useful to overcome writer's block. My outlook for the tool's future is pretty optimistic, and I think that things look good—another future success story waiting to happen.
author: Bhavik M.
pros: In a short period, LongShot has grown tremendously. I'll get right to it and cover a few of their features that I believe are game-changers when it comes to AI content writers. The first is their Niche feature, which helps AI write better content for you based on your niche. It gives AI the context you're trying to convey to the AI. The Niche feature provides good results for me, so I'm pretty happy! Among other features that I think are crucial for AI, writers are the Fact Check and Claim Detection features. AI tends to write garbage every now and then. That's where these two features ensure the content is factually accurate to combat this issue. And finally, the Write more feature! Love it! An absolute beaut.
cons: I don't have many complaints about this beautiful product. LongShot team can surely work on the UI/UX of their platform, but that's not really a big deal because the backend team is always bringing out updates at regular intervals.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: LongShot A1 Does Not Have Great Customer Service or Response
description: I am very disappointed in the product and their lack of customer service.
author: Tanya C.
pros: I liked what it sold me on during the trial.
cons: Longshot does not allow you to do all of the things in the trial once you pay the annual fee, and you cannot get in touch with their customer service even after emailing them several times.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great Feature Set, Great Support, Great Value for the Money
description: From skepticism to surprise to satisfaction, I've grown to consider LongShot the best of the AI content generation tools. And the customer support has been wonderful - they consider their users as part of the development team and are very responsive
author: Steve O.
pros: Writer's block is almost a thing of the past now. From generating ideas to expanding content or summarizing it, this helps you write quickly. And with a little practice, you can write entire articles with LongShot with surprisingly little direction. Want to write more than you do now, or faster? Try LongShot.
cons: LongShot's feature set has grown a LOT in the last year. And I like all of it. It might be a while before I consider tools like LongShot mission-critical, so I don't have a "like least" or "don't like" category. LongShot either does the job or makes the job easier about 80% of the time.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Powerful AI Content writing tool to make quality output
description: I've been a long-time user of LongShot AI and have been very happy with the results. I'm a professional content writer and happy with the output.
author: Shoukhin M.
pros: LongShot AI is a content generation platform that uses AI to automate the process of creating content. It helps you save time and energy by automatically generating content for your business. It also provides templates, which makes it easy for you to create quality articles in just a few minutes. It can produce text in a variety of formats such as blog posts, social media posts, articles, emails & more. The best part about it is that it's affordable! It costs approximately 1/3 of what other high-quality copywriters charge.
cons: In some cases, it provides more output than necessary given the input.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Amazing quality
description: Super and excellent.I will highly recommend it.
author: Bikramjit C.
pros: I have been using Long-shot for quite some time now.It has helped me immensely to shorten my research and create quality content with ease.Along with that , the content rephrasing feature is excellent and enables me to tailor my writing to suit perfectly to the intended mood and audience
cons: I believe there is still scope to improve the UI.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Easy to use without a bunch of unnecessary stuff
description: Product descriptions used to be a horrendous task for me, and Longshot makes it so easy now. Also, I no longer spend $$$ on hiring content writers, most of whom I'm not really satisfied with anyway. With Longshot, even with the editing I do to the generated blog posts, it still takes less time than ordering articles, reviewing articles, approving articles, etc., etc.
author: Nancy S.
pros: I use Longshot for product descriptions and blog posts. It's very easy to use - I can fill out a couple of boxes for a product description and it will generate 3 options, from which I either choose one or combine two or more to fill out the description. Very quick and easy. The blog posts make grammatical sense and are thorough and readable - very happy with the output. I do edit to add my own thoughts and do some edits if I feel it necessary, but it doesn't require much.
cons: For some reason, I could never find my past blog posts. But once I figured it out, it was okay.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The most amazing AI writing helper for SEO and content specialists!

pros: I like that it has all of the AI bells and whistles to support my SEO content writing efforts.
cons: The main thing that I don't like is that I can't turn it from light to dark. I would prefer dark mode over the white interface.

review_title: A very good AI-based tool for content writing that I have used so far
description: It significantly reduces the time needed to write a blog post with this tool. I am using it to write blog posts. I find that it helps me create content for my website.
author: Abu M.
pros: Longshot is an AI content tool I've been using recently. With just a single click, Longshot can generate creative ideas and professional content. I found the following features particularly interesting: 1. Rephraser 2. Headline & Headline intro 3. Blog Ideas & Blog Insights 4. Meta Description and 5. Keywords to Text etc. SEO is its main focus. The headlines and alternative keywords you choose for your article should be based on the SERP results in order to make it more SEO-friendly. The different tools on the site will give you ideas for headlines and blog posts.
cons: The free trial offers only 10 credits. It should have more short-form tools, like its competitors. The tool's long-form output sometimes doesn't meet the standards.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Longshot review

cons: No option to choose standard British English and colloquial American English, which means we need to manually edit all output. The lack of Grammarly integration is much missed. Difficult to find previously produced articles on Longshot.

review_title: Efficient and Reliable AI for Content Creation
description: My overall experience with LongShot AI has been impressive and productive. The platform makes content creation straightforward and effective, saving hours that would otherwise be spent researching and drafting. With its intuitive AI capabilities, LongShot AI has become an essential tool in my workflow, enhancing the quality and relevance of my content while allowing me to stay focused on other critical tasks. I’d highly recommend it to anyone seeking efficient content solutions with minimal effort.
author: Binayak J.
pros: LongShot AI stands out for its accuracy in generating high-quality, research-driven content quickly. Its ability to adapt to various tones and formats makes it versatile, whether I’m crafting marketing materials, blog posts, or social media content. The integration with SEO tools is seamless, providing content that ranks well while staying engaging.
cons: At times, the interface can feel slightly overwhelming due to the number of features, which may be challenging for new users to navigate. A more streamlined onboarding tutorial would be beneficial to guide users through the platform’s extensive capabilities.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: A great help if you need to add content to your existing piece.
description: My overall experience has been great. They have a good roadmap and the support helped me any time that I needed help. They are adding new features every now and then. It started with generating articles now they added a better outline, better keywords, a fact-checker, a marketing copy generator, a product copy generator and many more. I think the company is in their infancy but as time goes they are adding more and more features that keep on improving. Overall they are doing a good job, and just hope that it keeps getting better.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The thing that I like the most about the product is that I don't have to write about things that are tedious to write. For example, I'm writing a blog, and I need a definition of a term. Longshot really helps you with that. So whenever I am stuck or I want a quick paragraph to be generated. I write a command (eg. write a paragraph about the definition of hyperparameter tuning), and the AI-generated a pretty good copy. So it saves you a lot of time, allows you to focus on what is important in your article and can help you easily transform a 500 words piece into a 1000 word one. Pretty awesome. The quality of the text generated is more often than not very good too. They have been cases in which the generated text isn't good, so you will have to generate a few times to get it right.
cons: One of the things that could be improved was the length of the content. I want to be able to generate full articles after I give a couple of instructions, outlines or paragraphs. That would take this software to the next level. As of now if you want to use this tool to extend your writing, then it is great. If you want to generate a full article from this tool, it's alright BUT expect to do a lot of editing. Additionally making the editor accessible from the get-go will be better instead of going through the 4 steps process to generate an article.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Best for writers
description: Content writing and delivering. I supposed to make 2/3 long form blog with SEO daily. Longshot AI saved my hands and fingers however my wpm is around 45 to 50.

cons: Current interface is little bit complex. Previous one was easy and friendly.

review_title: Thanks for the help
description: I have been using this product for 2 years now. I love that they are always improving which enables me to continue to grow and do more work.
author: Mike S.
pros: Longshot makes my life easier. Why? I used to spend so much time trying to find the right words. As someone who makes social media posts for different clients, I found this to be a very discouraging part of the job. Buth with Longshot, I type in what comes to mind and let the software do the hard work.
cons: I don't use this software enough to speak to this. I use it for the same specific purposes each time.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Not my best experience with AI copywriting
description: After this experience with the article about Gus Grissom (it was August 2021), I kept using it for a while, ditching it after not so long, since the content produced wasn't that great. I've read that the product improved a lot over time, but I can't confirm it.
author: Gaia B.
pros: There can be many reasons why longshot AI could prove to be a valuable asset for content writing. Firstly, it is able to generate high-quality and engaging content on its own – without needing any input from human editors or authors. Secondly, it can quickly produce new content when needed – making sure that your website maintains an uninterrupted flow of fresh material. And finally, longshot AI is able to learn over time and improve its capabilities accordingly – meaning that you consistently get top-quality articles out of the machine instead of occasional hits and misses.
cons: The cons of using longshot AI for content writing are that it can be difficult to create a consistent tone and style, and the machine learning algorithm may not produce accurate or useful content. When I produced my first content I was writing about Gus Grissom (a famous astronaut). Longshot produced random content, incredibly short and not meaningful. I wasn't able to use any piece of content produced.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Excellent Long-Form AI Content Writing Tool
description: Excellent AI writing tool for content marketes.
author: Shaikat R.
pros: I got Longshot.ai when it was first launched as a lifetime deal. It was a great deal! I am highly impressed with the excellent content quality of long-from content. They've introduced many great features in the meantime, and the fact-checker tool is highly appreciated. They recently launched FactGPT, which can answer your question better than ChatGPT. I highly recommend this to anyone who wants to get their hands on a fantastic AI writing tool. This is a 10/10 tool for me.
cons: I have nothing to complain about this tool. It's here to stay.

review_title: Longshot | A great AI assistant for your writing
description: This is a great tool and possibly the future of writing? Where the author is still a key and integral part of the composition. Compared to the other tools I have tried out on a trial basis, this seems the most well rounded option. Longshot was pretty easy to begin using as well, I had also attended a demo for the same on Linkedin hosted by the founder which was of great help. I work in the niche of art and a lot of the content we write needs to be the right mix of being an interesting read backed by the historical facts, accuracy, and context to create a compelling story. I tried a couple of tools like Rytr and a few other easily available AI writing tools that are still a Longshot away :)
author: Bennet D.
pros: Loved the unstuck me option that allows a new perspective when the content generated isn't to your liking. Their free plan also gives you a good idea of what the tool can achieve.
cons: I think the Free trial needs more credits for people to truly explore the range of features this application has for different content needs.
